titleStmt.title: SII 26.289: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 289. (A.R. No. 274 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the failure of crops in Tirukkachchūr in the 10th year in the reign of the king and the consequent troubles of the people. It records the grant of 15 kāśu in lieu of the land given by the ūr in the Kīḻakkārāṇai of the piḍāgai of Tirukkachchūr, made by a certain Kuppaiśōṟuḍaiyān alias Oymānāṭṭu-vēḷāṉ, the kiḻavaṉ of Āyalūr, for food offerings to the deity Tiruvālākkōyil-uḍaiyār and for the eleven sandhyā lamps gifted by the ūr itself. The ūr, receiving the amount from the donor, had agreed to perform the services accordingly. The villages of Kūḍalūr, Śiṟumaṇūr, Mēlviḷimalli and Pērāmaṇūr are stated to form the boundary of the said land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kulottuṅkacoḷadevaṟku yāṇṭu muppatteḻāvatu kaḷattūrk koṭṭattu ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭu tirukkaccūrāṉa nittavinotanallūr Ūrom yāṇ
ṭu 10 Eṅkaḷūriṟ ceyta payiṟ cāvipoy Iṟai visanamikukaiyil Āyalūr kiḻavaṉ kuppaicoṟuṭaiyānāṉa Oymānāṭṭu veḷāṉ tiruvālakkoyi
ṉāṟku kaṟi Amurtu nālukkum ney Amurtukkum taiyir Amutukkum Aṭaikkā Amurtukkum Arici kuṟuṇikkum Ūril Eṅkaḷāl viṭṭuvarukira
san=tiviḷakku patinonṟukkum Uṭalāka Eṅkaḷūrpiṭākai kiḻkkārāṇai kūṭalūr Ellaikku meṟkum tenpāṟ ciṟumaṇūr Ellaikku vaṭakku
melviḷimallikkuk kiḻakkum perāmaṇūr Ellaikku teṟkkum Iṉṉāṉku Ellaikkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam kāṭu veṭṭikko
ḷakkaṭavanāna Ivaṉ pakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu patinaiñcu Ikkācu patinaiñcukkum poliūṭṭāka kuṭuttom Innilattukku I
tittavarai nāṅkaḷḷe Iṟuttu Inniman=tam celuttak kaṭavomāka kalveṭṭikkoḷka sāsanam paṇṇi kuṭuttom tirukkaccūr Ūrom Itanma
kumari Iṭaicceytān pāvette paṭuvāṉ śrīmāyeśurarakṣai . 2 kiḻk kāraṇaiāna śrīkaraṉaviḷākam ..
Digital edition of SII 26.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
